response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 15-year minimum with 19 years of diverse experience and is currently working on AI infrastructure, but lacks the demonstrated strategic customer advisory experience and AI product development expertise that the director-level role requires. Strong technical foundation and entrepreneurial track record, but the resume does not show evidence of partnering with strategic customers or identifying future platform directions at scale.
strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement with 19 years across full-stack, infrastructure, and emerging AI systems
Currently embedded in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation at re:cinq, demonstrating recent hands-on AI platform work
Proven entrepreneurial and mentoring leadership through 11+ years building GISCollective and extensive teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No demonstrated record of advising strategic enterprise customers on technology adoption or building customer advisory relationships
AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused rather than building products or platforms with AI, missing the preferred qualification
No evidence of director-level strategic work identifying future product directions or partnering at the executive/strategy level
